user_prompt: Consecrate the drop pod before charging
prayer:
Approach the drop pod with solemn reverence, beseeching the Omnissiah to awaken its Machine Spirit.

Commence the charging ritual by channeling holy voltage into its capacitors, harmonizing power-flows.
Chant the Canticle of Descent as the drop pod's energies surge, ensuring the Machine Spirit's wrathful readiness.

Seal the rite by anointing the sensor's core with sacred oils, beseeching unerring vigilance amidst peril.
